insight: "Ender Dragon takes only 1 damage / ignores group hits" is vanilla: non-head hits deal damage/4 + min(damage,1), and the 10-tick invulnerability window drops hits weaker than the last one. Boss never modifies incoming boss damage; EntityListener.onDamage only applies DAMAGE_MULTIPLIER when the boss attacks. Fixed via the Hit_Cooldown custom setting (default 20, sets maximumNoDamageTicks on spawn; 0 registers every hit).
